items.title: Paper Accepted at ICACS 2025
items.description: Paper accepted for publication (Proceedings to be archived in ACM Digital Library). Engineered a multimodal PTSD detection framework combining facial expression analysis with psychometric data.

items.title: Standing Ovation at IQVIA
items.description: Received a standing ovation and formal recognition from leadership at IQVIA for an internal presentation on ETL improvements and data platform work.

items.title: Talent Pool Scholarship
items.description: I was awarded the prestigious Talent Pool government scholarship for maintaining outstanding academic performance across three consecutive national board examinations (HSC, SSC, and PSC). This scholarship is granted to the top percentile of students nationwide based on merit.

items.title: Regional Fine Arts Awards
items.description: Recipient of multiple awards in regional fine arts and painting competitions.

items.title: Open Book Talent Exam
items.description: Recipient of 8th place in a national open book talent exam conducted by Udvash, showcasing strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
